metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

connectorUiConfig.title: Halcyon Connector (v2)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Halcyon](https://www.halcyon.ai) connector provides the capability to send data from Halcyon to Microsoft Sentinel. This v2 connector ingests Halcyon Events into `HalcyonEventsV2_CL` and Alert Updates into `HalcyonAlertUpdatesV2_CL`.

sampleQueries.query:
HalcyonEventsV2_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

HalcyonAlertUpdatesV2_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

dataTypes.name: Halcyon Events
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
HalcyonEventsV2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: Halcyon Alert Updates
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
HalcyonAlertUpdatesV2_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

value: union isfuzzy=true (HalcyonEventsV2_CL | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)), (HalcyonAlertUpdatesV2_CL | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)) | summarize LastLogReceived = max(LastLogReceived) | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra Create Permissions
customs.description: Permissions to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Typically requires Entra ID Application Developer role or higher.

customs.name: Role Assignment Permissions
customs.description: Write permissions required to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role to the data collection rule (DCR). Typically requires Owner or User Access Administrator role at the resource group level.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create ARM Resources and Provision Required Permissions
instructionSteps.description: This connector reads data from the tables that Halcyon uses in a Microsoft Analytics Workspace, if the data is being forwarded

parameters.content:
#### Automated Configuration and Secure Data Ingestion with Entra Application 
Clicking on "Deploy" will trigger the creation of Log Analytics tables and a Data Collection Rule (DCR). 
It will then create an Entra application, link the DCR to it, and set the entered secret in the application. This setup enables data to be sent securely to the DCR using an Entra token.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure your integration in the Halcyon Platform
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure your integration in the Halcyon Platform.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID (Client ID)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the App Registration Application ID

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret (Credential Secret) (THIS SECRET WILL NOT BE VISIBLE AFTER LEAVING THIS PAGE)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the App Registration Secret

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint (URL)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule ID (Rule ID)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the Data Collection Rule ID

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| where recordType == 'event'
| extend
    HalcyonSourceTime = datetime(1970-01-01) + (tolong(record.['time']) * 1ms),
    HalcyonEventId = tostring(record.metadata.original_event_uid),
    activity_id = toint(record.activity_id),
    activity_name = tostring(record.activity_name),
    category_uid = toint(record.category_uid),
    category_name = tostring(record.category_name),
    class_uid = toint(record.class_uid),
    class_name = tostring(record.class_name),
    severity_id = toint(record.severity_id),
    severity = tostring(record.severity),
    type_uid = tolong(record.type_uid),
    type_name = tostring(record.type_name),
    message = tostring(record.message),
    raw_data = tostring(record.raw_data),
    raw_record = tostring(record),
    status_id = toint(record.status_id),
    status = tostring(record.status),
    action_id = toint(record.action_id),
    action = tostring(record.action),
    disposition_id = toint(record.disposition_id),
    disposition = tostring(record.disposition),
    rcode = tostring(record.rcode),
    rcode_id = toint(record.rcode_id),
    metadata = todynamic(record.metadata),
    unmapped = todynamic(record.unmapped),
    actor = todynamic(record.actor),
    device = todynamic(record.device),
    file = todynamic(record.file),
    process = todynamic(record.process),
    user = todynamic(record.['user']),
    dst_endpoint = todynamic(record.dst_endpoint),
    src_endpoint = todynamic(record.src_endpoint),
    traffic = todynamic(record.traffic),
    query = todynamic(record.['query']),
    answers = todynamic(record.answers),
    driver = todynamic(record.driver),
    module = todynamic(record.module),
    app = todynamic(record.app)
| project
    TimeGenerated, HalcyonSourceTime, HalcyonEventId, activity_id, activity_name, category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name, severity_id, severity, type_uid, type_name,
    message, raw_data, raw_record, status_id, status, action_id, action,
    disposition_id, disposition, rcode, rcode_id, metadata, unmapped,
    actor, device, file, process, user, dst_endpoint, src_endpoint, traffic,
    query, answers, driver, module, app

source
| where recordType == 'alert'
| extend
    HalcyonSourceTime = datetime(1970-01-01) + (tolong(record.['time']) * 1ms),
    HalcyonAlertId = tostring(record.finding_info.uid),
    activity_id = toint(record.activity_id),
    activity_name = tostring(record.activity_name),
    category_uid = toint(record.category_uid),
    category_name = tostring(record.category_name),
    class_uid = toint(record.class_uid),
    class_name = tostring(record.class_name),
    type_uid = tolong(record.type_uid),
    type_name = tostring(record.type_name),
    ['count'] = toint(record.['count']),
    severity_id = toint(record.severity_id),
    severity = tostring(record.severity),
    status_id = toint(record.status_id),
    status = tostring(record.status),
    message = tostring(record.message),
    raw_record = tostring(record),
    action_id = toint(record.action_id),
    action = tostring(record.action),
    disposition_id = toint(record.disposition_id),
    disposition = tostring(record.disposition),
    finding_info = todynamic(record.finding_info),
    metadata = todynamic(record.metadata),
    device = todynamic(record.device),
    resources = todynamic(record.resources),
    actor = todynamic(record.actor),
    observables = todynamic(record.observables),
    unmapped = todynamic(record.unmapped),
    comment = tostring(record.comment),
    evidences = todynamic(record.evidences)
| project
    TimeGenerated, HalcyonSourceTime, HalcyonAlertId, activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name, class_uid, class_name, type_uid, type_name,
    ['count'], severity_id, severity, status_id, status, message, raw_record, action_id, action,
    disposition_id, disposition, finding_info, metadata, device, resources,
    actor, observables, unmapped, comment, evidences

properties.description: Halcyon_Alerts Data Parser with template version 3.2.0

tags.name: description
tags.value: Returns all Halcyon event records (HalcyonEventsV2_CL) whose unmapped.halcyon_alert_id matches the supplied HalcyonAlertId. Used to investigate the event timeline behind a Halcyon Alert.

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Halcyon solution for Microsoft Sentinel enables you to ingest Halcyon Events and Alert Updates into Microsoft Sentinel using the Microsoft Sentinel Analytics Workspace.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following Microsoft technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional data ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Microsoft Sentinel

  2. Azure Monitor Data Collection Rules (DCR)

  3. Azure Monitor Data Collection Endpoints (DCE)

  4. Azure Log Analytics workspaces

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 1, Hunting Queries: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
